name: claude-harness
description: Operational harness for Claude Code: defense-in-depth credential leak prevention, workflow guardrails, and behavioral rails distilled from production self-hosted use.

plugins.name: harness-core
plugins.description: Three defense-in-depth hooks: credential value scrub (PostToolUse), admission keyword reminder (UserPromptSubmit), bash command guard (PreToolUse). Built after repeated credential leak incidents — structural fix when behavioral rules in CLAUDE.md keep failing.
